text_original: I love the app but the only problem is when the free messages are used you can't chat for like 24 Hours it would've been a great app if it had unlimited messages then it would've been an instant 5 star
text_zh: 我非常喜欢这个应用，但唯一的问题是当免费消息用完后，大约24小时内都无法聊天。如果它有无限消息的话，那绝对是一个出色的应用，我会毫不犹豫地给5星好评。
reply_original: Thank you for the kind words! The 24-hour wait is genuinely frustrating when a conversation is going well. We hear you. Removing that limit is something our team is actively working toward. Your feedback has been noted and shared with our product team. Stay tuned for updates!
reply_zh:
你好！我完全理解你的沮丧。当对话进展顺利却达到限制时，确实非常令人恼火。对于这种体验，我深表歉意！

坦诚地说，维护一个能够提供高质量回答的智能 AI 需要投入极高的服务器成本。
reply_original_before_override:
Hi! I completely understand your frustration. It is really annoying when the conversation is going well and the limit runs out. I am so sorry for this experience!

To be transparent, maintaining a smart AI with high-quality responses involves very high server costs.
override_input: Thank you for the kind words! The 24-hour wait is genuinely frustrating when a conversation is going well. We hear you. Removing that limit is something our team is actively working toward. Your feedback has been noted and shared with our product team. Stay tuned for updates!
